title: StepMotech — Precision Motion Starts Here
seoDescription: From compact drives to high-torque motors and smart control systems, StepmoTech delivers rock-solid motion solutions built for serious performance.
bodyTextExcerpt: window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || []; function gtag() { dataLayer.push(arguments); } gtag('js', new Date()); gtag('config', 'AW-17117833825'); gtag('config', 'G-TLHZSDX6F1'); document.addEventListener('click', function (e) { let dom = e.target.closest('[type="submit"]'); if (dom === null) return; console.log('clicked Submit btn, executing code', dom); let form = dom.closest('form'); if (form.checkValidity() === false) throw new Error('form submit fail, invalid input'); let email = form.querySelector('input[type*="mail"]'); let phone_number = form.querySelector('input[type*="tel"]'); let upd = {}; if (email !== null && email !== undefined) { if (email.value !== "") { upd.email = email.value.trim().toLowerCase(); } } if (phone_number !== null && phone_number !== undefined) { const phoneNumber = phone_number.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '').replace(/^0+/, ''); // 国际手机号格式验证（以 + 开头，后接国家代码和号码，总长度建议不少于 7 位） const phoneRegex = /^\+[1-9]\d{1,2}[0-9]{7,}$/; // 示例：+8613800138000 if (phoneNumber) { const fullPhoneNumber = "+" + phoneNumber; if (phoneRegex.test(fullPhoneNumber)) { upd.phone_number = fullPhoneNumber; } else { console.log('Invalid phone number format:', fullPhoneNumber); throw new Error('Invalid phone number format:'+ fullPhoneNumber); // 格式不正确时不收录触发 } } /*if (phone_number.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '') != "") { upd.phone_number = "+" + phone_number.value.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '').replace(/^0+/, ''); }*/ } if (Object.keys(upd).length !== 0) { gtag('set', 'user_data', upd); gtag('event', 'form_submit', { "send_to": "AW-17117833825" }); // gtag('event', 'form_submit', { "send_to": "G-TLHZSDX6F1" }); } }); window.addEventListener('load', function () { var targetNodes = document.querySelectorAll('[class*="wpcf7-response-output"]'); function adsConversionLogic(mutation) { if (mutation.target.attributes.class.value.includes("alert-success")) { gtag('event', 'conversion', { 'send_to': 'AW-17117833825/dTqRCKyxq90aEOHUteI_' }); return true; } return false; } // Options for the
